page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: DLIGAND2: an improved knowledge-based energy function for protein-ligand interactions using the distance-scaled, finite, ideal-gas reference state.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: An improved knowledge-based energy function for protein-ligand interactions using the distance-scaled, finite, ideal-gas reference state | DLIGAND2 is a knowledge-based method to predict protein-ligand binding affinity based on a distance-scaled, finite, ideal-gas reference (DFIRE) state
